prompts.description: Image generation prompts. One ctx.callImageGenerator per prompt; aborts mid-batch on ctx.signal.

platform.description: Target ad platform (meta/google/tiktok/linkedin/...). Used in prompt enhancement. Defaults to 'meta'.

aspectRatio.description: Fallback dimension derivation when placementSpec is absent. Used as ratio with config.maxDimension.

placementSpec.description: Caller-supplied placement spec (replaces source's PlatformSpecRegistry lookup). When imageSpec.recommendedWidth/Height are present, used as output dimensions (capped at maxDimension).

style.description: Style key. Known: photorealistic / illustration / flat-design / minimalist / bold-graphic / lifestyle / product-shot. Unknown keys passed through as free-form text.

brandColors.description: Hex/name color list appended to prompt context.

count.description: Images per prompt. Defaults to 2; pack caps to 8 (host MAY cap further).

seed.description: Deterministic seed. When supplied, prompt i uses seed+i for variation.
